chapman_feature_or_context: NET/release proteome material composition (histones, MPO, neutrophil elastase)
allowed_synthesis: Chapman defines NET/release material composition while Li_ST002477 defines a severity-associated metabolomic state; together they support an evidence-tiered link between metabolic state and neutrophil extracellular effector material as complementary non-equivalent layers.
prohibited_synthesis: sample-level correlation; co-measurement; causal mechanism; metabolism-to-NETosis inference; NETosis rate; NET clearance; NET pathogenicity; executed neutrophil function
next_validation_needed: paired design (NET proteome + metabolome on the same samples) before any joint/quantitative claim
